title: The new 27 seconds of Shin
wikitext:
[]: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by Mr. M » Mon May 10, 2021 2:04 pm So has anyone seen the new footage? Has it surfaced online?

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by hui43210 » Mon May 10, 2021 2:14 pm Context would be nice.

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by Mr. M » Mon May 10, 2021 2:17 pm hui43210 wrote: Context would be nice.

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by hui43210 » Mon May 10, 2021 2:20 pm Ah okay. Doesn't look like anyone has ripped it yet, so no I haven't seen it. I wonder if you can use a VPN on Amazon Prime.

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon May 10, 2021 2:32 pm Mr. M wrote: hui43210#922444 wrote: Context would be nice.

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by Mr. M » Mon May 10, 2021 2:37 pm The first one. It would be interesting tho.

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon May 10, 2021 2:51 pm ^ Okay, thanks for the clarification.

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by FryMeTuhDehMuhn » Mon May 10, 2021 3:07 pm It's on Discord, is it against the rules to share it?

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon May 10, 2021 3:09 pm FryMeTuhDehMuhn wrote: It's on Discord, is it against the rules to share it?

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by FryMeTuhDehMuhn » Mon May 10, 2021 4:00 pm pwhodges wrote: FryMeTuhDehMuhn#922457 wrote: It's on Discord, is it against the rules to share it?

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon May 10, 2021 4:18 pm I just watched it; all that happens is Asuka squishing Shinji's face and yelling at him a bit, Shinji's plug suit having a small display that reads "WARNING: BATTERY EXTREMELY LOW" and "SUIT IMPAIRED", and then Kensuke shows up in his Hazmat suit driving some truck

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by Konja7 » Mon May 10, 2021 4:48 pm Blockio wrote: I just watched it; all that happens is Asuka squishing Shinji's face and yelling at him a bit, Shinji's plug suit having a small display that reads "WARNING: BATTERY EXTREMELY LOW" and "SUIT IMPAIRED", and then Kensuke shows up in his Hazmat suit driving some truck

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon May 10, 2021 6:29 pm No, probably because of his non-lilin nature; all the lilin needed to have helmets on

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 10, 2021 6:35 pm Blockio wrote: No, probably because of his non-lilin nature; all the lilin needed to have helmets on

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon May 10, 2021 9:30 pm Here's the ADR for the scene, if anyone's curious. There's a bad machine translation of it going around and I feel like setting the record straight. 15:54 (Japanese) 手首のエネルギーモニターに数値が刻まれる。アスカが歩み寄る。シンジの頬に手を当て、うつむいた顔を覗き込む。暗がりを薙ぎ払う強い光。照らし出されたアスカと別レイが振り向く。 15:54 (English) A battery readout flickers on Shinji's wrist. Asuka walks over to him. She places her hand on his cheek, looking into his downcast eyes. A strong light pierces through the darkness. Asuka and Rei(?) turn toward the light, illuminated by its glare.

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue May 11, 2021 12:33 am Reichu's partial translation of part I just went up, including THIS gem: Asuka: You're still a pseudo-Lilin. If you don't eat, you won't survive.

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue May 11, 2021 1:28 am Kendrix wrote: Reichu's partial translation of part I just went up, including THIS gem: Asuka: You're still a pseudo-Lilin. If you don't eat, you won't survive.

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by wiser3754 » Tue May 11, 2021 2:14 am Is th is the one you're talking about? It shows Shinji with his suit displaying a warning message on his wrist. https://youtu.be/1xy9wgwyFGA

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue May 11, 2021 2:37 am That's DEFINITELY new footage alas the quality isn't good enough to read all the details. All in all the wasteland scene seems to have compressed a lot from the initial drafts, there's some shots from 'until you come to me' and 'peaceful times' that weren't there (mainly ReiQ looking out at the ocean and eating food, as well as that bird's eye shot of Asuka doing some more kicking, a shot where Shinji has a blanket...) The locations are similar tho (Asuka looks at her meter by the sea, and the kicking is in that same place where they're spending the night) so this might've been time cuts. Or, it was a drawn out scene, & became a montage in that rewrite that scrapped the first 40 minutes

[]: Re: The new 27 seconds of Shin             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue May 11, 2021 4:29 am wiser3754 wrote: Is th is the one you're talking about? It shows Shinji with his suit displaying a warning message on his wrist. https://youtu.be/1xy9wgwyFGA

 the wasteland scene seems to have compressed a lot from the initial drafts, there's some shots from 'until you come to me' and 'peaceful times' that weren't there (mainly ReiQ looking out at the ocean and eating food, as well as that bird's eye shot of Asuka doing some more kicking, a shot where Shinji has a blanket...) The locations are similar tho (Asuka looks at her meter by the sea, and the kicking is in that same place where they're spending the night) so this might've been time cuts. Or, it was a drawn out scene, & became a montage in that rewrite that scrapped the first 40 minutes
